name: Blood Cries from the Ground
oracleText:
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, Blood Cries from the Ground deals 1 damage to that player and you may exile target card from their graveyard.
Whenever a card leaves an opponent's graveyard, scry 1.
flavorText: "The voice of thy brother's blood crieth unto me from the ground." — Genesis 4:10
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Cain and Abel old-master artwork to keep the murder-and-judgment imagery visually aligned.
